title: jasonia montana
intro: Jasonia montana, also known as mountain jasonia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasonia montana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Jasonia montana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Planta medica", Jasonia montana essential oil has been found to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal properties, including activity against Bacillus subtilis, Trichophyton mentagrophytes, Cryptococcus neoformans, and Candida albicans.
